betOfDay.analysis: OKC is the best team in the NBA this season and they are an absolute force at home. The Celtics have been inconsistent on the road and this is a massive environment to come into. Thunder -6.5 is properly priced — sharps haven't moved it off this number. Boston will compete but OKC has the depth, the defense, and the crowd. Lay the points.

picks.reasoning: OKC is the best team in the league and one of the most dominant home teams in the NBA. Celtics have been inconsistent away from the Garden. Thunder have the defense and depth to win this by double digits. Best game on the slate — back the Thunder.

Heat at home are one of the most consistently dangerous teams in the East. Bucks are dealing with roster questions on the road and Miami's defense is top-tier. -6 at home is right in the Heat's wheelhouse.
Grizzlies are scrappy at home and 4.5 points is a solid cushion. Dallas has been inconsistent on the road. Taking the points with the home team in a competitive mid-stakes game.

Canes are one of the best teams in the NHL and dominant at PNC Arena. Blues are struggling and have the worst road record in the Metropolitan division matchup. -1.5 at -110 is outstanding value for a team of Carolina's caliber. Take the puck line.

research.nba: Thursday slate — 10 NBA games. Headliner is Celtics @ OKC at 7:40 PM MT. Other notable games: Bucks @ Heat at 5:40 PM and Nuggets @ Spurs at 7:10 PM. Playoff seeding races heating up with about 3 weeks left in the regular season.
research.nhl: 14 NHL games tomorrow. Hurricanes vs Blues is the value play on the puck line. Big Western matchup: Oilers @ Stars at 6:00 PM MT.
